articles.title: Milan, Juve, Como and Roma in 6 points. CorSport: "It doesn't end here"

articles.title: The code of gestures in the VAR room: new shadows on the investigation
articles.summary: According to La Repubblica, at the center of the new line of the referee investigation there would be an alleged system of gestures and signals used in the VAR room to communicate through the windows, renamed by the newspaper "Gioca Jouer".

articles.title: Allegri gives his team a day of rest after Juve: no training today at Milanello
articles.summary: After the draw against Juventus, Massimiliano Allegri gave his team a day off: no training is scheduled today. The restart will take place tomorrow afternoon with the first session towards Sassuolo.
